mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, IFNULL(u.name, u.username) AS userName, te.team_id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, IFNULL(la.cnt, 0) AS currentLoad FROM sp_processing_unit_team ut JOIN sp_team t ON t.id = ut.team_id AND t.is_deleted = '0' JOIN sp_team_employee te ON te.team_id = ut.team_id AND te.is_deleted = '0' JOIN sp_sys_user u ON u.id = te.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.user_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sp_order_oper_assign a JOIN sp_order o ON o.id = a.order_id WHERE a.is_deleted = '0' AND a.status <> '2' AND o.statue IN (1, 2) GROUP BY a.user_id ) la ON la.user_id = u.id WHERE ut.unit_id = #{unitId} AND ut.is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY currentLoad ASC, u.id ASC
